Fields

CanReorderItems

WinUI CanReorderItems: rows drag-reorder among their siblings (kind scoped to this tree). Defaults to true, matching WinUI (TreeView.idl:141 [MUX_DEFAULT_VALUE("true")] + TreeView.xaml:12 <Setter Property="CanReorderItems" Value="True"/>).

public bool CanReorderItems

Field Value

bool

Expanding 

public Action<TreeNode, bool>? Expanding

Field Value

Action<TreeNode, bool>

IsMultiSelectEnabled

WinUI TreeViewSelectionMode.Multiple: checkbox lane + cascading subtree selection.

public bool IsMultiSelectEnabled

Field Value

bool

ItemInvoked

WinUI TreeView.ItemInvoked — raised on row click/Enter (TreeView.cpp:159-165).

public Action<TreeNode>? ItemInvoked

Field Value

Action<TreeNode>

ItemTemplate

Custom row content (icon + label + metadata) — WinUI ContentTemplate (TreeViewItem.xaml:147).

public Func<TreeNode, Element>? ItemTemplate

Field Value

Func<TreeNode, Element>

OnReorder

Reorder commit: (parent — null at root level, fromChildIndex, toChildIndex). When null and the sibling array is mutable, the tree moves the node in place (WinUI mutates its own node tree).

public Action<TreeNode?, int, int>? OnReorder

Field Value

Action<TreeNode, int, int>

Roots 

public IReadOnlyList<TreeNode> Roots

Field Value

IReadOnlyList<TreeNode>

SelectionChanged

Selection changed (node, isSelected). Multi mode reports each toggled node once per gesture root.

public Action<TreeNode, bool>? SelectionChanged

Field Value

Action<TreeNode, bool>

FluentGpu — a near-zero-allocation, NativeAOT, GPU-rendered UI engine for .NET 10. Usage docs live here; architecture canon lives in design/ (SPEC-INDEX.md is the precedence authority).
